completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part: web SPA using React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Supabase, and TanStack Query

Found 38 documentation and workflow artifacts across docs, .github, and _bmad-output; primary context is docs/index.md, architecture.md, data-models.md, state-management.md, ADR-005, modernization plan, and TanStack migration planning artifacts
Tech stack: React 18.3.1, TypeScript 5.9.3 strict, Vite 6.4.2, Tailwind CSS 4.2.4, Supabase JS 2.104.1, TanStack Query 5.100.1, Vitest 4.1.5, Playwright 1.59.1

Exhaustive conditional scan complete: 103 src files, 45 component TSX files, 12 hook files, 4 contexts, 11 migrations, 10 tables, 43 RLS policies, 10 triggers, 6 unit-test files, and 2 Playwright setup/spec files
source-tree-analysis.md regenerated with annotated top-level, src, supabase, tests, scripts, .github, and docs structure
development-guide.md regenerated with prerequisites, env modes, npm scripts, local Supabase, test, CI, deploy, and workflow guidance
architecture.md regenerated for the single web part with runtime topology, provider tree, data/state/realtime architecture, testing, deployment, constraints, and risks
supporting docs regenerated: project-overview.md, data-models.md, state-management.md, component-inventory.md, source-tree-analysis.md, development-guide.md
index.md regenerated as the master documentation entry point with current stack, docs map, feature map, and AI notes
Validation complete: Markdown formatted, JSON state parsed, generated-doc links resolved, no incomplete-doc markers found, git diff whitespace check passed

project_classification.primary_tech: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite + Supabase + TanStack Query

findings.existing_docs_summary: Generated docs live in docs/; historical inventories are in docs/legacy/; current planning context is in _bmad-output/planning-artifacts and implementation/test artifacts; CI and assistant workflow guidance live under .github/.
